title: Epic: Secondary type methods (SpaceInvite, SpaceBan, CustomEmoji, PresenceStatus)
description:
Why: Several type families have no method coverage at all or are missing critical methods: SpaceInvite (missing /changes, /set), SpaceBan (no methods), CustomEmoji (missing /queryChanges for cache maintenance), ReadPosition (missing /changes), PresenceStatus (missing /set and /changes). These are needed for a full-featured client.

What:
- SpaceInvite/get, SpaceInvite/changes (new per IMPROVEMENTS.md §7), SpaceInvite/set (accept/decline/create)
- SpaceBan/get, SpaceBan/set (ban/unban members)
- CustomEmoji/get, CustomEmoji/changes, CustomEmoji/set, CustomEmoji/query, CustomEmoji/queryChanges (new per IMPROVEMENTS.md §8)
- ReadPosition/changes
- PresenceStatus/set (update statusText, statusEmoji, presence, receiptSharing) and PresenceStatus/changes
- Fixture tests for all methods

Depends on: types.rs upgrades epic (jmap-chat-tui-1aq), methods refactor epic
